name: Sheoldred's Edict
author: no joshii
bootlegger: If no player dies for two consecutive day/night cycles, the game ends and both teams lose. The first night does not count.
Each night, if the storyteller believes that the demon is sinking kills to avoid what will be an otherwise inevitable game loss for evil by forcing a tie, deaths that night are arbitrary.
Changes from BMR: pacifist -> acrobat //////// innkeeper -> monk //////// courtier -> high priestess //////// minstrel -> alchemist //////// lunatic -> golem //////// mastermind -> poisoner
